{{Quote|Hardpoint Squadron: mount up.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Betrayal">''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''</ref>}}
'''Hardpoint Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that was entirely composed of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi ace|pilots]] flying [[XJ6 X-wing starfighter|XJ6 X-wings]]. The unit was in existence as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Including [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and [[Toile Senn]], Hardpoint Squadron was assigned as '''"Team Womprat"''' during their role in [[Operation Roundabout]]. The squadron engaged [[Five Worlds|Corellian]] attack fighters, leading to the death of Toile Senn, and escorted [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo's]] teams off [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]].

It later was a part of the [[Tralus Ground Occupation Forces]], under the command of Solo and [[Zekk]]. It participated in the [[Battle of Tralus (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Tralus]]. In the squadron, Solo flew [[TRAGOF1103]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
